title: Report to legislature
doc_html:
§516.  Report to legislature

The adjutant general shall report to the legislature at each regular session the condition and affairs of the home, the amount of receipts and expenditures, the number of residents received into the home, and the number of deaths occurring therein.
doc_text:
§516.  Report to legislature
The adjutant general shall report to the legislature at each regular session the condition and affairs of the home, the amount of receipts and expenditures, the number of residents received into the home, and the number of deaths occurring therein.
